allow: Bash(python3 -c "import chromadb; c = chromadb.PersistentClient\(path='./chroma_db'\); col = c.get_collection\('firstaid'\); print\(f'Collection size: {col.count\(\)}'\)")
Bash(python -c "import ast, sys; ast.parse\(open\('api/main.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('api/main.py parses OK'\)")
Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -X utf8 -m uvicorn api.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001 --log-level warning)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/answer -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"how do I treat a minor burn","top_k":5}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/answer -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"que faire en cas de brulure","top_k":3}')

Bash(python -X utf8 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('answer:', d['answer'][:300]\); print\('mode:', d['answer_mode'], 'conf:', d['confidence'], 'topic:', d['topic_prediction']\)")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/answer -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"كيف اعالج الحرق","top_k":3}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8001/answer -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"someone is unconscious and not breathing","top_k":3}')
Bash(python -X utf8 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('answer:', d['answer'][:300]\); print\('mode:', d['answer_mode'], 'conf:', d['confidence']\)")
